reviews.review_description: This game is very confusing, ive tried a lot of different things to understand but i STILL don't know what to do.

This is usable. Put the stethoscope over each point, hear the sound. There’s a couple of pathologies as a demo, then to hear the rest it’s a subscription. May suit a school situation but hard to see the value for an individual.
Great simulation app, lots of cases, very realistic patients, hands-on practice
This game is so fun. You should download it for sure why you get to check people out and like it’s so fun if you want to be a doctor 100%￼￼

when i grow up i want to be a doctor chemistry scientist and this actually makes helping easier if there was infinite stars i would give would recommend if you want to be a doctor or you are a doctor but a beginner
Its really exciting experiences using this demi apps
Probably one of the most promising applications out here, had the chance to try out the demo, wonderful experience I must say.

reviews.review_title: the futur in medecine school is VR
reviews.review_description: this is the future, the quality of the hearth beat is very high, i wish i could have the full app to present to my faculty here in Italy !
